findings.description: PascalCase class `Project` appears in s1 code (`List<Project> projects = readFileAndValidate(...)`) but is absent from s1 hints.
`ApplicationException` is referenced in s2 content ('ApplicationException を送出する') but is missing from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: この値を使用して業務例外を送出するなどの制御を行う。 (source implementation point for empty PartInfo list)
